description:
I was told there wasn't enough evidence, no problem.

FushAA- (https://tabstats.com/siege/player/fushaa/1479e99d-cb8d-4a85-b7f0-d9689f1beb59 ) has 7 banned accounts, and on one of them, namely Haramu2k. (https://tabstats.com/siege/player/haramu2k/479f0b8d-4283-43b1-9fa6-044488dc4477 ) there was a nickname CheaterList, exactly the same was on his main account on Mar 22, 2022.

He also has an account that does not appear in his Smurfs and has the nickname v7Fushaa. (https://tabstats.com/siege/player/v7fushaa/086819e9-7b3b-4816-9932-fd160e0aa692 ), in his history there is a nickname FushAA- which was changed Apr 9, 2021

I believe that this direct data from his banned accounts should be enough, if you look at his banned accounts, you will see 6 more accounts that I did not mention, which also have a lock for cheats
